display.purpose: Landing hero and the worker's current-state headline.

headline.purpose: Admin page and major section titles.

label.purpose: Form labels, badges, table headers — sentence case.

data.purpose: Times, durations, Worked Hours, PINs — tabular figures.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Floating overlays only: dropdowns, selects, popovers, dialogs, toasts. Surfaces at rest are flat.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions; calm, no bounce.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, and small state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default admin-density primary action: steel-blue fill, white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; gap: 6px; background: oklch(0.46 0.12 248); color: oklch(1 0 0); font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 0.625rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.40 0.12 248); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.55 0.13 248 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Field Clock Button
components.description: Worker clock-in/out action: oversized, full-width, glove- and sunlight-friendly.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-field"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="22" height="22" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"/><path d="M12 7v5l3 2"/></svg>Clock in</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-field { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; width: 100%; height: 56px; background: oklch(0.46 0.12 248); color: oklch(1 0 0); font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.0625rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 0.625rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-field:hover { background: oklch(0.40 0.12 248); } .ds-btn-field:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px oklch(0.55 0.13 248 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-field:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action: white with ink text and a hairline border.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; gap: 6px; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.20 0.012 248); font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid oklch(0.90 0.006 248); border-radius: 0.625rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.975 0.004 248); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.55 0.13 248 / 0.5); border-color: oklch(0.55 0.13 248); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard field with steel focus ring; no layout shift on focus.
components.css: .ds-input { height: 32px; width: 240px; padding: 0 10px; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.20 0.012 248); font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.90 0.006 248); border-radius: 0.625rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.48 0.015 248); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: oklch(0.55 0.13 248); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.55 0.13 248 / 0.5); }

components.name: PIN Field
components.description: Worker PIN entry: oversized, mono tabular digits, generous tracking.
components.css: .ds-input-pin { height: 56px; width: 100%; padding: 0 16px; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.20 0.012 248); font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 500; font-feature-settings: 'tnum'; letter-spacing: 0.5em; text-align: center; border: 1px solid oklch(0.90 0.006 248); border-radius: 0.625rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-input-pin:focus-visible { border-color: oklch(0.55 0.13 248); box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px oklch(0.55 0.13 248 / 0.5); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Flat surface separated by a 1px ring; no shadow.
components.html:
Today's shifts
Alice clocked in at 07:58.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; padding: 16px; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.20 0.012 248); border-radius: 0.875rem; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.20 0.012 248 / 0.10); } .ds-card-title { font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.35; } .ds-card-body { font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.48 0.015 248); } .ds-data { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-feature-settings: 'tnum'; color: oklch(0.20 0.012 248); }

components.name: On Site Badge
components.description: Solid green status pill with icon — never color alone.
components.html: On site
components.css: .ds-badge-onsite { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; background: oklch(0.55 0.13 150); color: oklch(1 0 0); font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 0.5rem; }

components.name: Incomplete Badge
components.description: Soft amber pill for auto-closed Incomplete shifts flagged for review.
components.html: Incomplete
components.css: .ds-badge-incomplete { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; background: oklch(0.93 0.08 80); color: oklch(0.42 0.09 70); font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 0.5rem; }

narrative.overview: Sited should feel like the clipboard bolted to the trailer wall — the one dependable instrument a crew trusts to record who worked, where, and for how long. The system is built around a single steel-blue brand color on a flat, high-contrast neutral surface; the blue is utility infrastructure blue, not startup cobalt. It is legibility-first: a tool used one-handed, outdoors, in direct sun, sometimes in gloves — so contrast is generous, type is plain, and times/durations/PINs are set in tabular monospace. The worker clock flow and the admin dashboard share one language at two densities.
keyCharacteristics: One brand hue (steel blue), reserved for action and active state — never decoration.
Pure-white surfaces; color and type carry the mood, not the background.
Flat by default: hairline rings, not shadows, separate surfaces.
Field-grade contrast and touch targets on the worker flow.
Monospace tabular figures for every time, duration, and PIN.

rules.name: The One Blue Rule
rules.body: Steel blue is the only brand hue. It appears on primary actions and active state and nowhere decorative. Green, red, and amber are reserved exclusively for shift status.

rules.name: The Status-Never-Color-Alone Rule
rules.body: On site / off site and open / complete / incomplete must always pair the color with a text label and an icon.

rules.name: The Tabular Truth Rule
rules.body: Every time, duration, Worked-Hours total, and PIN renders in Geist Mono with tabular figures so numbers align and never shift width.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat and ring-bordered at rest. A shadow signals an element floats above the page; if it isn't floating, it gets a ring, not a shadow.

rules.name: The Field-Target Rule
rules.body: On the worker clock flow, primary actions and inputs are ≥56px tall and full-width. The compact 32px controls are for the admin desktop only.

dos: Do keep steel blue as the single brand hue — primary actions and active state only.
Do keep backgrounds pure white / near-black; let the blue and type carry the mood.
Do set all times, durations, and PINs in Geist Mono with tabular figures.
Do separate surfaces with a 1px ring; reserve shadow for true overlays.
Do use ≥56px full-width targets on the worker clock flow.
Do pair every status color with a text label and an icon.
Do keep Muted Ink at oklch(0.48 …) or darker so secondary text clears 4.5:1.
donts: Don't build the generic purple-gradient SaaS look — no gradient text, no glassmorphism, no hero-metric template.
Don't drift toward cluttered enterprise time-tracker density (ADP / Kronos).
Don't add playful or childish cuteness — no mascots, toy rounding, or emoji UI.
Don't fall back to anonymous stock shadcn gray; this system has a committed color.
Don't brighten the brand into cobalt SaaS-blue — keep it deep and steel (chroma ≤ ~0.14).
Don't convey shift status with color alone.
Don't use the compact 32px controls for the primary worker clock actions.
Don't use border-left/border-right color stripes as accents on cards or alerts.
